mapper.select: WITH dept_tree AS ( SELECT CAST(department_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS department_id FROM department WHERE name LIKE '%终端店铺%' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(d.department_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) FROM department d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON CAST(d.parent_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) = dt.department_id ) SELECT department_id FROM dept_tree
mapper.sql: CASE WHEN es.sync_time IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN CONVERT(DATE, es.sync_time) < CONVERT(DATE, ea_latest.sync_date) THEN 0 ELSE es.sync_status END
mapper.select:
SELECT ea_latest.employees_id AS employeeId, ei.staff_name AS staffName, ei.staff_no AS staffNo, ei.mobile_no AS mobileNo, ei.department_name AS departmentName, ei.enroll_in_date AS dateLabel, ei.staff_status AS staffStatus, AS syncStatus, es.sync_time AS syncTime, es.error_message AS errorMessage
ORDER BY ea_latest.sync_date DESC, ei.staff_name OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.sql: CASE WHEN es.sync_time IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN CONVERT(DATE, es.sync_time) < CONVERT(DATE, em_latest.sync_date) THEN 0 ELSE es.sync_status END

FROM ( SELECT staff_id, MAX(sync_date) AS sync_date FROM employee_modifications
CONVERT(DATE, sync_date) BETWEEN CONVERT(DATE, #{startDate}) AND CONVERT(DATE, #{endDate})
GROUP BY staff_id ) em_latest INNER JOIN employee_information ei ON em_latest.staff_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN erp_employee_sync_status es ON em_latest.staff_id = es.employee_id AND es.sync_type = 'UPDATE'
AND ei.department_id IN
#{did}
AND ei.staff_name LIKE '%' + #{staffName} + '%'
AND ei.staff_no LIKE '%' + #{staffNo} + '%'
AND = #{syncStatus}
AND ei.staff_no NOT IN
#{sno}
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM employee_additions ea WHERE ea.employees_id = em_latest.staff_id AND CONVERT(DATE, ea.sync_date) = CONVERT(DATE, em_latest.sync_date) )
mapper.select:
SELECT em_latest.staff_id AS employeeId, ei.staff_name AS staffName, ei.staff_no AS staffNo, ei.mobile_no AS mobileNo, ei.department_name AS departmentName, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), em_latest.sync_date, 120) AS dateLabel, ei.staff_status AS staffStatus, AS syncStatus, es.sync_time AS syncTime, es.error_message AS errorMessage
ORDER BY em_latest.sync_date DESC, ei.staff_name OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT ei.id AS employeeId, ei.staff_name AS staffName, ei.staff_no AS staffNo, ei.mobile_no AS mobileNo, ei.department_name AS departmentName, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ei.leave_date, 120) AS dateLabel, ei.staff_status AS staffStatus, ISNULL(es.sync_status, 0) AS syncStatus, es.sync_time AS syncTime, es.error_message AS errorMessage
ORDER BY ei.leave_date DESC, ei.staff_name OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

WITH dept_tree AS ( SELECT CAST(department_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS department_id FROM department WHERE name LIKE '%终端店铺%' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(d.department_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) FROM department d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON CAST(d.parent_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) = dt.department_id ) SELECT ea_latest.employees_id AS employeeId, ei.staff_name AS staffName, ei.staff_no AS staffNo FROM ( SELECT employees_id, MAX(sync_date) AS sync_date FROM employee_additions GROUP BY employees_id ) ea_latest INNER JOIN employee_information ei ON ea_latest.employees_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN erp_employee_sync_status es ON ea_latest.employees_id = es.employee_id AND es.sync_type = 'ONBOARDING' WHERE IN (0, 2) AND ei.staff_status != 'LEAVED' AND ei.department_id IN (SELECT department_id FROM dept_tree)

WITH dept_tree AS ( SELECT CAST(department_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS department_id FROM department WHERE name LIKE '%终端店铺%' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(d.department_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) FROM department d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON CAST(d.parent_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) = dt.department_id ) SELECT em_latest.staff_id AS employeeId, ei.staff_name AS staffName, ei.staff_no AS staffNo FROM ( SELECT staff_id, MAX(sync_date) AS sync_date FROM employee_modifications GROUP BY staff_id ) em_latest INNER JOIN employee_information ei ON em_latest.staff_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN erp_employee_sync_status es ON em_latest.staff_id = es.employee_id AND es.sync_type = 'UPDATE' WHERE IN (0, 2) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM employee_additions ea WHERE ea.employees_id = em_latest.staff_id AND CONVERT(DATE, ea.sync_date) = CONVERT(DATE, em_latest.sync_date) ) AND ei.department_id IN (SELECT department_id FROM dept_tree)

WITH dept_tree AS ( SELECT CAST(department_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS department_id FROM department WHERE name LIKE '%终端店铺%' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(d.department_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) FROM department d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON CAST(d.parent_id AS NVARCHAR(50)) = dt.department_id ) SELECT ei.id AS employeeId, ei.staff_name AS staffName, ei.staff_no AS staffNo FROM employee_information ei LEFT JOIN erp_employee_sync_status es ON ei.id = es.employee_id AND es.sync_type = 'LEAVING' WHERE ei.leave_date IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(es.sync_status, 0) IN (0, 2) AND ei.department_id IN (SELECT department_id FROM dept_tree)
mapper.insert: MERGE erp_employee_sync_status AS target USING (SELECT #{entity.employeeId} AS employee_id, #{entity.syncType} AS sync_type) AS source ON target.employee_id = source.employee_id AND target.sync_type = source.sync_type WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET staff_name = #{entity.staffName}, staff_no = #{entity.staffNo}, sync_status = #{entity.syncStatus}, erp_object_id = #{entity.erpObjectId}, sync_time = #{entity.syncTime}, error_message = #{entity.errorMessage}, update_time = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (sync_type, employee_id, staff_name, staff_no, sync_status, erp_object_id, sync_time, error_message, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{entity.syncType}, #{entity.employeeId}, #{entity.staffName}, #{entity.staffNo}, #{entity.syncStatus}, #{entity.erpObjectId}, #{entity.syncTime}, #{entity.errorMessage}, GETDATE(), GETDATE());
